name: rename_a_slack_channel
description: Renames a public or private slack channel; for enterprise grid workspaces, the user must be a workspace admin or channel manager.

name.description:
The new name for the channel. Channel names can be up to 80 characters long and may include lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores. They cannot contain spaces or periods.
Examples:
  "project-alpha-bugs"
  "team-marketing-campaign"

channel_id.description:
The ID of the channel to rename.
Example: "C012AB3CD"
